  --radius-md: 10px;
  --layout-max: 1340px;
  --topbar-height: 60px;
  --space-page: clamp(10px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --space-section: clamp(12px, 2vw, 18px);
  --space-card: clamp(13px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --control-height: 38px;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-width: 320px;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfcf8 0%, var(--color-page) 100%);
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible,
[role="button"]:focus-visible,
.btn:focus-visible,
.input:focus-visible,
.select:focus-visible,
.textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.28);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}

body,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 600;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-shell {
  width: min(calc(100% - 20px), var(--layout-max));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid-2 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.grid-3 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.card {
  background: var(--surface-raised);
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.card.subtle {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.eyebrow {
  color: var(--color-brand-700);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.brand-title {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.4vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 1.8vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
}

p {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  line-height: 1.42;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.btn {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 13px;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.btn:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--color-brand-700);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(87, 139, 38, 0.18);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #b4473f;
  color: white;
}

.input,
.select,
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  padding: 9px 11px;
  outline: none;
}

.textarea {
  min-height: 84px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.input:focus,
.select:focus,
.textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--color-brand-600);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.12);
}

.label {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 760px;
}

.table th,
.table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  padding: 9px 9px;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.table th {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.73rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.table tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.table tbody tr {
  transition: background 0.16s ease;
}

.table tbody tr:hover td {
  background: rgba(242, 248, 234, 0.52);
}

.badge {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  background: var(--color-brand-100);
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.muted {
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.alert {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 10px 12px;
  background: #fff3f0;
  color: #8d2d25;
  border: 1px solid #ffd2ca;
}


@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --topbar-height: 56px;
  }

  .grid-2,
  .grid-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .page-shell {
    width: min(100% - 16px, var(--layout-max));
  }

  .stack,
  .grid {
    gap: 10px;
  }


  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .table.responsive-table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;
  }

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,
  .table.responsive-table td {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .table.responsive-table tr {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    padding: 10px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 7.5vw, 1.95rem);
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.workspace-head.compact-head h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2.05rem);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.workspace-head.compact-head p:last-child {
  max-width: 740px;
}

.workspace-head h1,
.workspace-head h2,
.workspace-head p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .workspace-head {
    align-items: start;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

<script id="unhead:payload" type="application/json">{"title":"Husky Pass CRM"}</script><style type="text/css" data-vite-dev-id="C:/Users/hp/husky-pass-crm/assets/css/main.css">:root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --color-brand-950: #16230f;
  --color-brand-900: #263f1c;
  --color-brand-800: #355f24;
  --color-brand-700: #578b26;
  --color-brand-600: #6f971a;
  --color-brand-300: #bfd99f;
  --color-brand-200: #ddebca;
  --color-brand-100: #f2f8ea;
  --color-amber: #ffb545;
  --color-amber-soft: #fff3db;
  --color-blue: #236188;
  --color-blue-soft: #eef7fb;
  --color-red: #b4473f;
  --color-red-soft: #fff3f0;
  --color-gold: #8a650c;
  --color-gold-soft: #fff8ea;
  --color-ink: #1e2a1a;
  --color-muted: #65705f;
  --color-soft: #899383;
  --color-border: #dfe8d7;
  --color-surface: #ffffff;
  --color-page: #f6f8f1;
  --surface-muted: #f8faf4;
  --surface-raised: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  --shadow-card: 0 10px 28px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.1);
  --shadow-soft: 0 4px 14px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.07);
  --shadow-line: 0 1px 0 rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.9);
  --radius-xl: 14px;
  --radius-lg: 12px;
  --radius-md: 10px;
  --layout-max: 1340px;
  --topbar-height: 60px;
  --space-page: clamp(10px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --space-section: clamp(12px, 2vw, 18px);
  --space-card: clamp(13px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --control-height: 38px;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-width: 320px;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfcf8 0%, var(--color-page) 100%);
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible,
[role="button"]:focus-visible,
.btn:focus-visible,
.input:focus-visible,
.select:focus-visible,
.textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.28);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}

body,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 600;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-shell {
  width: min(calc(100% - 20px), var(--layout-max));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid-2 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.grid-3 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.card {
  background: var(--surface-raised);
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.card.subtle {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.eyebrow {
  color: var(--color-brand-700);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.brand-title {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.4vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 1.8vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
}

p {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  line-height: 1.42;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.btn {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 13px;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.btn:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--color-brand-700);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(87, 139, 38, 0.18);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #b4473f;
  color: white;
}

.input,
.select,
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  padding: 9px 11px;
  outline: none;
}

.textarea {
  min-height: 84px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.input:focus,
.select:focus,
.textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--color-brand-600);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.12);
}

.label {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 760px;
}

.table th,
.table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  padding: 9px 9px;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.table th {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.73rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.table tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.table tbody tr {
  transition: background 0.16s ease;
}

.table tbody tr:hover td {
  background: rgba(242, 248, 234, 0.52);
}

.badge {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  background: var(--color-brand-100);
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.muted {
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.alert {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 10px 12px;
  background: #fff3f0;
  color: #8d2d25;
  border: 1px solid #ffd2ca;
}


@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --topbar-height: 56px;
  }

  .grid-2,
  .grid-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .page-shell {
    width: min(100% - 16px, var(--layout-max));
  }

  .stack,
  .grid {
    gap: 10px;
  }


  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .table.responsive-table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;
  }

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,
  .table.responsive-table td {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .table.responsive-table tr {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    padding: 10px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 7.5vw, 1.95rem);
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.workspace-head.compact-head h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2.05rem);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.workspace-head.compact-head p:last-child {
  max-width: 740px;
}

.workspace-head h1,
.workspace-head h2,
.workspace-head p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .workspace-head {
    align-items: start;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

<script id="unhead:payload" type="application/json">{"title":"Husky Pass CRM"}</script><style type="text/css" data-vite-dev-id="C:/Users/hp/husky-pass-crm/assets/css/main.css">:root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --color-brand-950: #16230f;
  --color-brand-900: #263f1c;
  --color-brand-800: #355f24;
  --color-brand-700: #578b26;
  --color-brand-600: #6f971a;
  --color-brand-300: #bfd99f;
  --color-brand-200: #ddebca;
  --color-brand-100: #f2f8ea;
  --color-amber: #ffb545;
  --color-amber-soft: #fff3db;
  --color-blue: #236188;
  --color-blue-soft: #eef7fb;
  --color-red: #b4473f;
  --color-red-soft: #fff3f0;
  --color-gold: #8a650c;
  --color-gold-soft: #fff8ea;
  --color-ink: #1e2a1a;
  --color-muted: #65705f;
  --color-soft: #899383;
  --color-border: #dfe8d7;
  --color-surface: #ffffff;
  --color-page: #f6f8f1;
  --surface-muted: #f8faf4;
  --surface-raised: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  --shadow-card: 0 10px 28px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.1);
  --shadow-soft: 0 4px 14px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.07);
  --shadow-line: 0 1px 0 rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.9);
  --radius-xl: 14px;
  --radius-lg: 12px;
  --radius-md: 10px;
  --layout-max: 1340px;
  --topbar-height: 60px;
  --space-page: clamp(10px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --space-section: clamp(12px, 2vw, 18px);
  --space-card: clamp(13px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --control-height: 38px;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-width: 320px;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfcf8 0%, var(--color-page) 100%);
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible,
[role="button"]:focus-visible,
.btn:focus-visible,
.input:focus-visible,
.select:focus-visible,
.textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.28);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}

body,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 600;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-shell {
  width: min(calc(100% - 20px), var(--layout-max));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid-2 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.grid-3 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.card {
  background: var(--surface-raised);
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.card.subtle {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.eyebrow {
  color: var(--color-brand-700);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.brand-title {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.4vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 1.8vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
}

p {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  line-height: 1.42;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.btn {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 13px;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.btn:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--color-brand-700);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(87, 139, 38, 0.18);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #b4473f;
  color: white;
}

.input,
.select,
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  padding: 9px 11px;
  outline: none;
}

.textarea {
  min-height: 84px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.input:focus,
.select:focus,
.textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--color-brand-600);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.12);
}

.label {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 760px;
}

.table th,
.table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  padding: 9px 9px;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.table th {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.73rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.table tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.table tbody tr {
  transition: background 0.16s ease;
}

.table tbody tr:hover td {
  background: rgba(242, 248, 234, 0.52);
}

.badge {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  background: var(--color-brand-100);
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.muted {
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.alert {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 10px 12px;
  background: #fff3f0;
  color: #8d2d25;
  border: 1px solid #ffd2ca;
}


@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --topbar-height: 56px;
  }

  .grid-2,
  .grid-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .page-shell {
    width: min(100% - 16px, var(--layout-max));
  }

  .stack,
  .grid {
    gap: 10px;
  }


  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .table.responsive-table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;
  }

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,
  .table.responsive-table td {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .table.responsive-table tr {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    padding: 10px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 7.5vw, 1.95rem);
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.workspace-head.compact-head h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2.05rem);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.workspace-head.compact-head p:last-child {
  max-width: 740px;
}

.workspace-head h1,
.workspace-head h2,
.workspace-head p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .workspace-head {
    align-items: start;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

<script id="unhead:payload" type="application/json">{"title":"Husky Pass CRM"}</script><style type="text/css" data-vite-dev-id="C:/Users/hp/husky-pass-crm/assets/css/main.css">:root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --color-brand-950: #16230f;
  --color-brand-900: #263f1c;
  --color-brand-800: #355f24;
  --color-brand-700: #578b26;
  --color-brand-600: #6f971a;
  --color-brand-300: #bfd99f;
  --color-brand-200: #ddebca;
  --color-brand-100: #f2f8ea;
  --color-amber: #ffb545;
  --color-amber-soft: #fff3db;
  --color-blue: #236188;
  --color-blue-soft: #eef7fb;
  --color-red: #b4473f;
  --color-red-soft: #fff3f0;
  --color-gold: #8a650c;
  --color-gold-soft: #fff8ea;
  --color-ink: #1e2a1a;
  --color-muted: #65705f;
  --color-soft: #899383;
  --color-border: #dfe8d7;
  --color-surface: #ffffff;
  --color-page: #f6f8f1;
  --surface-muted: #f8faf4;
  --surface-raised: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  --shadow-card: 0 10px 28px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.1);
  --shadow-soft: 0 4px 14px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.07);
  --shadow-line: 0 1px 0 rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.9);
  --radius-xl: 14px;
  --radius-lg: 12px;
  --radius-md: 10px;
  --layout-max: 1340px;
  --topbar-height: 60px;
  --space-page: clamp(10px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --space-section: clamp(12px, 2vw, 18px);
  --space-card: clamp(13px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --control-height: 38px;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-width: 320px;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfcf8 0%, var(--color-page) 100%);
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible,
[role="button"]:focus-visible,
.btn:focus-visible,
.input:focus-visible,
.select:focus-visible,
.textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.28);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}

body,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 600;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-shell {
  width: min(calc(100% - 20px), var(--layout-max));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid-2 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.grid-3 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.card {
  background: var(--surface-raised);
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.card.subtle {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.eyebrow {
  color: var(--color-brand-700);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.brand-title {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.4vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 1.8vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
}

p {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  line-height: 1.42;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.btn {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 13px;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.btn:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--color-brand-700);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(87, 139, 38, 0.18);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #b4473f;
  color: white;
}

.input,
.select,
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  padding: 9px 11px;
  outline: none;
}

.textarea {
  min-height: 84px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.input:focus,
.select:focus,
.textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--color-brand-600);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.12);
}

.label {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 760px;
}

.table th,
.table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  padding: 9px 9px;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.table th {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.73rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.table tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.table tbody tr {
  transition: background 0.16s ease;
}

.table tbody tr:hover td {
  background: rgba(242, 248, 234, 0.52);
}

.badge {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  background: var(--color-brand-100);
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.muted {
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.alert {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 10px 12px;
  background: #fff3f0;
  color: #8d2d25;
  border: 1px solid #ffd2ca;
}


@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --topbar-height: 56px;
  }

  .grid-2,
  .grid-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .page-shell {
    width: min(100% - 16px, var(--layout-max));
  }

  .stack,
  .grid {
    gap: 10px;
  }


  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .table.responsive-table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;
  }

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,
  .table.responsive-table td {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .table.responsive-table tr {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    padding: 10px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 7.5vw, 1.95rem);
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.workspace-head.compact-head h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2.05rem);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.workspace-head.compact-head p:last-child {
  max-width: 740px;
}

.workspace-head h1,
.workspace-head h2,
.workspace-head p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .workspace-head {
    align-items: start;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

<script id="unhead:payload" type="application/json">{"title":"Husky Pass CRM"}</script><style type="text/css" data-vite-dev-id="C:/Users/hp/husky-pass-crm/assets/css/main.css">:root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --color-brand-950: #16230f;
  --color-brand-900: #263f1c;
  --color-brand-800: #355f24;
  --color-brand-700: #578b26;
  --color-brand-600: #6f971a;
  --color-brand-300: #bfd99f;
  --color-brand-200: #ddebca;
  --color-brand-100: #f2f8ea;
  --color-amber: #ffb545;
  --color-amber-soft: #fff3db;
  --color-blue: #236188;
  --color-blue-soft: #eef7fb;
  --color-red: #b4473f;
  --color-red-soft: #fff3f0;
  --color-gold: #8a650c;
  --color-gold-soft: #fff8ea;
  --color-ink: #1e2a1a;
  --color-muted: #65705f;
  --color-soft: #899383;
  --color-border: #dfe8d7;
  --color-surface: #ffffff;
  --color-page: #f6f8f1;
  --surface-muted: #f8faf4;
  --surface-raised: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  --shadow-card: 0 10px 28px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.1);
  --shadow-soft: 0 4px 14px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.07);
  --shadow-line: 0 1px 0 rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.9);
  --radius-xl: 14px;
  --radius-lg: 12px;
  --radius-md: 10px;
  --layout-max: 1340px;
  --topbar-height: 60px;
  --space-page: clamp(10px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --space-section: clamp(12px, 2vw, 18px);
  --space-card: clamp(13px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --control-height: 38px;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-width: 320px;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfcf8 0%, var(--color-page) 100%);
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible,
[role="button"]:focus-visible,
.btn:focus-visible,
.input:focus-visible,
.select:focus-visible,
.textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.28);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}

body,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 600;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-shell {
  width: min(calc(100% - 20px), var(--layout-max));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid-2 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.grid-3 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.card {
  background: var(--surface-raised);
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.card.subtle {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.eyebrow {
  color: var(--color-brand-700);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.brand-title {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.4vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 1.8vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
}

p {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  line-height: 1.42;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.btn {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 13px;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.btn:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--color-brand-700);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(87, 139, 38, 0.18);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #b4473f;
  color: white;
}

.input,
.select,
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  padding: 9px 11px;
  outline: none;
}

.textarea {
  min-height: 84px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.input:focus,
.select:focus,
.textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--color-brand-600);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.12);
}

.label {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 760px;
}

.table th,
.table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  padding: 9px 9px;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.table th {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.73rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.table tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.table tbody tr {
  transition: background 0.16s ease;
}

.table tbody tr:hover td {
  background: rgba(242, 248, 234, 0.52);
}

.badge {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  background: var(--color-brand-100);
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.muted {
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.alert {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 10px 12px;
  background: #fff3f0;
  color: #8d2d25;
  border: 1px solid #ffd2ca;
}


@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --topbar-height: 56px;
  }

  .grid-2,
  .grid-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .page-shell {
    width: min(100% - 16px, var(--layout-max));
  }

  .stack,
  .grid {
    gap: 10px;
  }


  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .table.responsive-table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;
  }

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,
  .table.responsive-table td {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .table.responsive-table tr {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    padding: 10px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 7.5vw, 1.95rem);
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.workspace-head.compact-head h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2.05rem);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.workspace-head.compact-head p:last-child {
  max-width: 740px;
}

.workspace-head h1,
.workspace-head h2,
.workspace-head p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .workspace-head {
    align-items: start;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

  --surface-muted: #f8faf4;
  --surface-raised: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  --shadow-card: 0 10px 28px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.1);
  --shadow-soft: 0 4px 14px rgba(45, 73, 31, 0.07);
  --shadow-line: 0 1px 0 rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.9);
  --radius-xl: 14px;
  --radius-lg: 12px;
  --radius-md: 10px;
  --layout-max: 1340px;
  --topbar-height: 60px;
  --space-page: clamp(10px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --space-section: clamp(12px, 2vw, 18px);
  --space-card: clamp(13px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --control-height: 38px;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-width: 320px;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfcf8 0%, var(--color-page) 100%);
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible,
[role="button"]:focus-visible,
.btn:focus-visible,
.input:focus-visible,
.select:focus-visible,
.textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.28);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}

body,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 600;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-shell {
  width: min(calc(100% - 20px), var(--layout-max));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid-2 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.grid-3 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.card {
  background: var(--surface-raised);
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.card.subtle {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.eyebrow {
  color: var(--color-brand-700);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.brand-title {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.4vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 1.8vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
}

p {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  line-height: 1.42;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.btn {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 13px;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.btn:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--color-brand-700);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(87, 139, 38, 0.18);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #b4473f;
  color: white;
}

.input,
.select,
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  padding: 9px 11px;
  outline: none;
}

.textarea {
  min-height: 84px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.input:focus,
.select:focus,
.textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--color-brand-600);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.12);
}

.label {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 760px;
}

.table th,
.table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  padding: 9px 9px;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.table th {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.73rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.table tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.table tbody tr {
  transition: background 0.16s ease;
}

.table tbody tr:hover td {
  background: rgba(242, 248, 234, 0.52);
}

.badge {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  background: var(--color-brand-100);
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.muted {
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.alert {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 10px 12px;
  background: #fff3f0;
  color: #8d2d25;
  border: 1px solid #ffd2ca;
}


@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --topbar-height: 56px;
  }

  .grid-2,
  .grid-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .page-shell {
    width: min(100% - 16px, var(--layout-max));
  }

  .stack,
  .grid {
    gap: 10px;
  }


  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .table.responsive-table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;
  }

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,
  .table.responsive-table td {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .table.responsive-table tr {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    padding: 10px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 7.5vw, 1.95rem);
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.workspace-head.compact-head h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2.05rem);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.workspace-head.compact-head p:last-child {
  max-width: 740px;
}

.workspace-head h1,
.workspace-head h2,
.workspace-head p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .workspace-head {
    align-items: start;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}
